title: neottopteris mauritiana
intro: Neottopteris mauritiana, also known as the Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neottopteris mauritiana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antiseptic and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
